examples: Future-mindedness contributes to the disorder in American life, the obliviousness to history, the high rates of family breakdown, the frenzied waste of natural resources.
The dancing is uninhibited and as frenzied as an aerobics class.
Hence the frenzied increase in top executive pay and bank bonuses.
His expectations may have been tempered by the frenzied competition in the tablet space.
For the U.S. stock markets as a whole the day was one of frenzied selling.
